allowed_claims: Stage6 has replicated AAN consumer intake, manifest check, task-root mount, and no-local-repair verification on one articulated asset and one rigid transparent prop.
The replicated package-local USDs open and their required non-N/A prims resolve through the LabUtopia/GenManip composite asset root.

assets.blocker_or_next_action: Add a generic AAN task lane/evaluator adapter that consumes task/task_config.yaml, task/required_prims.yaml, and task/evaluator.yaml, or define how producer-delivered evaluator entrypoints are installed into the GenManip/EBench runtime.

blockers.detail: No GenManip configs/tasks/ebench/labutopia_lab_poc task lane exists for AAN08.MuffleFurnaceDoor or AAN08.TransparentBeaker; current AAN runtime smoke lane is DryingBox-specific.

assets.producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage1_3; coordinate evaluator/plugin contract before Stage4b

assets.blocker_or_next_action: Add a generic AAN task lane/evaluator adapter that consumes task/task_config.yaml, task/required_prims.yaml, and task/evaluator.yaml, or define how producer-delivered evaluator entrypoints are installed into the GenManip/EBench runtime.

blockers.detail: No GenManip configs/tasks/ebench/labutopia_lab_poc task lane exists for AAN08.MuffleFurnaceDoor or AAN08.TransparentBeaker; current AAN runtime smoke lane is DryingBox-specific.

assets.producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage1_3; coordinate evaluator/plugin contract before Stage4b

blocked_claims: AAN08 assets have passed LabUtopia / GenManip live eval smoke
official EBench leaderboard or policy success is proven
generic evaluator dispatch for arbitrary AAN task/evaluator.yaml is implemented
blocker_or_next_action: Implement the consumer-side generic AAN task/evaluator adapter, then rerun Stage4b for at least one replicated asset.
meaning: Two non-DryingBox AAN packages pass consumer intake, manifest check, task-root mount dry-run, and no-local-repair verification; Stage4b runtime smoke is blocked on a missing generic AAN task/evaluator dispatch layer, not on package-local USD composition.
notes: Earlier 20260701_094329/094343 mount records blocked because the consumer interpreted path=N/A and status=not_applicable as a required USD prim. The consumer parser was updated by TDD to align with the AAN-07 contract: non-N/A required prims must resolve; N/A/not_applicable roles do not represent USD prims.
No ConvertAsset package files were edited; no-local-repair verify records remain PASS for both assets.
producer_owner_action: not_required_for_stage1_3; coordinate evaluator/plugin contract before Stage4b
